title: Canadian Immunization Guide updates and National Advisory Committee on Immunization - publications mailing list - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Immunization Guide updates and National Advisory Committee on Immunization - publications mailing list
- Cancelling your subscription
To receive information regarding updates to the Canadian Immunization  Guide and new National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI)  recommendations, statements and literature reviews, please enter your e-mail  address below and click on the " Subscribe " button.

## Cancelling your subscription
If you are already a subscriber and wish to cancel, type in your e-mail address in the box below and click on the "Unsubscribe" button.
